# Job 17

## Verses (16)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | My spirit is broken, my days are ended, the last resting-place is ready for me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Truly, those who make sport of me are round about me, and my eyes become dark because of their bitter laughing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Be pleased, now, to be responsible for me to yourself; for there is no other who will put his hand in mine. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | You have kept their hearts from wisdom: for this cause you will not give them honour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | As for him who is false to his friend for a reward, light will be cut off from the eyes of his children. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | He has made me a word of shame to the peoples; I have become a mark for their sport. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | My eyes have become dark because of my pain, and all my body is wasted to a shade. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The upright are surprised at this, and he who has done no wrong is troubled because of the evil-doers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Still the upright keeps on his way, and he who has clean hands gets new strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | But come back, now, all of you, come; and I will not see a wise man among you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | My days are past, my purposes are broken off, even the desires of my heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | They are changing night into day; they say, The light is near the dark. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | If I am waiting for the underworld as my house, if I have made my bed in the dark; | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | If I say to the earth, You are my father; and to the worm, My mother and my sister; | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Where then is my hope? and who will see my desire? | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Will they go down with me into the underworld? Will we go down together into the dust? | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |

<!-- END AUTO-INDEX -->
